description: JARS.LT is a Baltic company registry search service covering Lithuania, Estonia, and Latvia, with company, address, financial, and statistics data. It also offers an MCP interface so AI tools can query registry and statistics data.
summary: JARS.LT exposes a documented REST API at https://api.jars.lt/api/v1, a streamable HTTP MCP server at https://api.jars.lt/mcp, and an official npm-distributed Node.js SDK; the REST API uses an API key, while the MCP server supports both API key and OAuth 2.0 via well-known discovery.
